intro: Tanacetum mikeschinii, also known as Mikeschin's tansy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems.
